description_long: This is a large, open-top tote handbag made from a light blush pink perforated material, likely neoprene, with contrasting trim and handles in a slightly darker pink. The bag features two long, rounded handles for shoulder or hand carrying, and a matching detachable zippered pouch attached to one side with a black clip. The interior is spacious and unlined, with visible seams and a structured yet flexible form. Black piping outlines the top edge, and a small rectangular brand tag is affixed vertically near the top on one side. The overall design is minimalist and modern, with subtle textural interest from the perforated surface.
description: A blush pink perforated tote handbag with long handles, black piping, and a detachable matching zippered pouch. The design is minimalist and modern with a spacious, open interior.
description_view_0: Front view showing the open-top design, two long handles, black piping, and the attached zippered pouch on the right side.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the bag's depth, the attachment of the zippered pouch, and the slim profile of the handles.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the clean back panel, brand tag, and the absence of the pouch on this side.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the bag's depth and the handles, with the pouch attachment visible on the left.
attribute_brand_logo: A small rectangular black tag with white text, vertically affixed near the top edge on one side of the bag.
attribute_strap_type: Two long, rounded, fixed handles suitable for shoulder or hand carrying, attached at the top edges.
attribute_closure_mechanism: Open-top main compartment with no visible closure; detachable pouch features a zipper closure.
